content: We can repurpose the sigmoid function to dynamically scale intrinsic curiosity reward output from an ICM in autonomous agents, clamping reward to a 0-1 range that prevents reward explosion from unpredictable high-uncertainty encounters in 2025 swarm UAV deployments. This scaled reward naturally prioritizes moderately novel unexplored environments over completely unobservable out-of-distribution zones, aligning the agent’s curiosity drive with practical exploration efficiency for real-world navigation.
